nasb.text: Even though you offer up to Me burnt offerings and your grain offerings, I will not accept them; And I will not even look at the peace offerings of your fatlings.

esv.text: Even though you offer me your burnt offerings and grain offerings, I will not accept them; and the peace offerings of your fattened animals, I will not look upon them.

cnv.text: 雖然你們給我獻上燔祭和素祭， 我卻不接受。 你們獻上肥美的牲畜作平安祭， 我也不悅納。

ccb.text: 即使你们献上燔祭和素祭， 我也不悦纳； 即使你们用肥美的牲畜献上平安祭， 我也不屑一顾。
